name: resize_image
description: Resize an image file preserving aspect ratio if one dimension is 0.

src.description: Path to the source image file

image_path.description: Path to the source image file (alternative to src)

dst.description: Path to save the resized image (optional)

width.description: Width in pixels (0 to preserve aspect ratio)

height.description: Height in pixels (0 to preserve aspect ratio)
